name: Ricotta Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a small bowl with an electric mixer on high speed, beat egg white until stiff but not dry; set aside.
3. In another small bowl, beat egg yolk and sugar until slightly thick and lemon-colored; set aside.
4. Place cheese in a sieve and press to drain any excess liquid.
5. Add the drained cheese to the egg yolk mixture with lemon peel; blend well.
6. Stir in flour and baking powder until well combined.
7. Gently fold in the egg white.
8. Pour the mixture into four 4-ounce ramekins, filling about 2/3 full.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
10. If desired, garnish each serving with a sprinkle of cinnamon-sugar mix and a strawberry.
11. Serve immediately.
